channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: How Israel could complicate Iran peace negotiations. And, World Cup highlights
item.description: Israel has been sidelined in the agreement between the U.S. and Iran. It could spoil peace negotiations. And, it's been a thrilling start to the World Cup.
item.content:encoded:
Israel has been sidelined in the agreement between the U.S. and Iran. It could spoil peace negotiations. And, it's been a thrilling start to the World Cup.

(Image credit: Atta Kenare)
item.dc:creator: Suzanne Nuyen

item.title: Is it a renter's market? It depends on where you live
item.description: About 40% of rentals on Zillow offer move-in deals, like a month of free rent, thanks to a construction boom that created an apartment surplus in some parts of the United States.
item.content:encoded:
About 40% of rentals on Zillow offer move-in deals, like a month of free rent, thanks to a construction boom that created an apartment surplus in some parts of the United States.

(Image credit: Stephan Bisaha)
item.dc:creator: Stephan Bisaha

item.title: Is a transparent fish the future of brain science? This center is betting on it
item.description: One of the world's leading brain research centers is shifting away from fruit flies and toward a tiny, transparent fish. The goal: to understand how brains control the behavior of an animal or human.
item.content:encoded:
One of the world's leading brain research centers is shifting away from fruit flies and toward a tiny, transparent fish. The goal: to understand how brains control the behavior of an animal or human.

(Image credit: Chie Satou)
item.dc:creator: Jon Hamilton

item.title: Voting officials fear DHS may actually be a threat to elections this year
item.description: Voting officials worry that the Department of Homeland Security will not be a partner helping to secure elections, but rather a threat seeking to undermine results that President Trump dislikes.
item.content:encoded:
Voting officials worry that the Department of Homeland Security will not be a partner helping to secure elections, but rather a threat seeking to undermine results that President Trump dislikes.

(Image credit: Oliver Contreras)
item.dc:creator: Miles Parks

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: Israel's reluctance on Lebanon ceasefire complicates U.S.-Iran deal, first full day of G7 summit gets underway in France, what to watch as voters in several states head to the polls for primaries.
item.content:encoded: Israel's reluctance on Lebanon ceasefire complicates U.S.-Iran deal, first full day of G7 summit gets underway in France, what to watch as voters in several states head to the polls for primaries.
item.dc:creator: A Martínez

item.title: DMV artist turns belts into a conversation about discipline
item.description: Multidisciplinary artist Lex Marie has gone viral on TikTok and Instagram for her artwork confronting discipline within Black households.
item.content:encoded: Multidisciplinary artist Lex Marie has gone viral on TikTok and Instagram for her artwork confronting discipline within Black households.
item.dc:creator: Nia Dumas

item.title: 40-year-old Cape Verde goalkeeper keeps favorite Spain to 0 goals at World Cup
item.description: Vozinha recorded seven saves Monday, holding Spain's star-studded lineup to a shocking 0-0 draw. The veteran keeper was everywhere as the Spanish team and its fans became increasingly frustrated.
item.content:encoded:
Vozinha recorded seven saves Monday, holding Spain's star-studded lineup to a shocking 0-0 draw. The veteran keeper was everywhere as the Spanish team and its fans became increasingly frustrated.

(Image credit: Mike Stewart)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: UFC boss Dana White says 'never again' to another White House fight night
item.description: The headaches over weather concerns in the outdoors show, the logistics of construction of the cage and staging events at federal landmarks and the soaring cost made Freedom 250 a one-off.
item.content:encoded:
The headaches over weather concerns in the outdoors show, the logistics of construction of the cage and staging events at federal landmarks and the soaring cost made Freedom 250 a one-off.

(Image credit: Alex Brandon)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: G7 allies scramble to put Ukraine back atop Trump's agenda as war drags on
item.description: U.S. allies at the Group of Seven summit are pushing the war in Ukraine back on President Donald Trump's agenda. The Iran conflict has recently overshadowed the war in Ukraine.
item.content:encoded:
U.S. allies at the Group of Seven summit are pushing the war in Ukraine back on President Donald Trump's agenda. The Iran conflict has recently overshadowed the war in Ukraine.

(Image credit: Thibault Camus)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Here are the District of Columbia's 2026 primary election results
item.description: Live election results: Get the latest on U.S. delegate and mayoral primary races in Washington, D.C.
item.content:encoded: Live election results: Get the latest on U.S. delegate and mayoral primary races in Washington, D.C.
item.dc:creator: NPR Staff
